title: × asterago lutea
intro: × Asterago lutea, also known as the yellow-flowered or golden samphire, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to Australia and South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of × Asterago lutea include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and experience its health benefits.
